title: FE Commissioner intervention: Mary Ward Settlement
body: "A summary of the Further Education (FE) Commissioner’s findings and recommendations following a review of the Mary Ward Settlement. The review follows an intervention visit in April 2025.  The letter from Minister for Skills Jacqui Smith to the chair of the college:   sets out the outcome of the intervention assessment confirms the next steps to be taken   We produce these reports in line with our commitment to intervention in further education.  "

taxons.title: Further education intervention notices and reports
